title: Spicy Crispy Chinese Garlic Stir-fry
description: A quick and flavorful meal-prep dish featuring crispy garlic stir-fried with Sichuan peppercorns and other aromatic seasonings for a spicy kick.
instructions: Pat the chicken dry with paper towels and season both sides with salt.
Place chicken on a lined baking sheet. Drizzle with olive oil, sprinkle chili flakes, and crush Sichuan peppercorns over each piece evenly.
Bake for 18-20 minutes or until fully cooked (internal temperature reaches at least 165°F).
While the chicken is cooking, heat remaining tablespoon of olive oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
Add minced garlic and stir-fry for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not browned. Remove from heat.
Return the cooked chicken to the wok with reserved juices, toss well to coat evenly.
